name: Bose TV Speaker Bluetooth Soundbar
description: The Bose TV Speaker Bluetooth Soundbar is a small soundbar that clarifies speech and improves overall TV sound. Designed with simplicity in mind, a single connection to your TV via an optical audio cable (included) or an HDMI™ cable (sold separately) has you up and running in no time. And at just over 2 inches tall, this TV Speaker is small enough to fit just about anywhere. Small LED lights on the front turn on and/or change color when certain features are enabled. The Bose TV Speaker Bluetooth Soundbar comes with its own remote. And on it, you can enable Dialogue Mode™ to further elevate center vocals, pair your Bluetooth® device to wirelessly stream your favorite music or podcast, or add a bass boost for extra depth. And the Bose TV Speaker is Roku TV Ready™ certified. Meaning, it’s designed to work seamlessly with a Roku TV™ when connected via an HDMI cable. In addition to power and volume control, enjoy smooth, automatic setup, easy access to the TV Speaker sound settings in the Roku TV on-screen menu, and compatibility with the Roku TV remote. If you want to expand your system, you can anytime by adding a wired subwoofer. The Bose TV Speaker is compatible with the Bose Bass Module 500 and 700.
